ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-14-2010 IN 220, DEFENDANT REPUBLIC SUPPLY COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE TRIAL DATE, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE HELD. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT REPUBLIC SUPPLY COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE OR CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS SEVERED FROM BRAYTON GROUP 528 AND THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF JANUARY 24, 2011 IS VACATED. THE CASE IS ADDED TO BRAYTON GROUP 563 WITH A TRIAL DATE OF APRIL 25, 2011 CONDITIONED ON ALL THE PLAINTIFFS BEING MADE AVAILABLE FOR DEPOSITION DURING THE WEEK OF OCTOBER 25 OR ANY MUTUALLY AGREEABLE DAYS THE WEEK OF OCTOBER 18. IF THE CONDITIONS ARE NOT MET, DEFENDANT IS INVITED TO MAKE AN EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR A FURTHER TRIAL CONTINUANCE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (220)
